title: Brownell Boat Stands & Equipment Company ransomware incident

extortion.description: Brownell Boat Stands & Equipment Company ((founded 1954)- manufactures safest boat stands and equipment on the market. Brownell Boat Stands corporate office is located in 5 Boat Rock Rd, Mattapoisett, Massachusetts, 02739, United States. The total amount of data leakage is 17.00 GB
